items.name_en: Factory Grade Groove 20 Handbag Black
items.name_cn:
Factory Grade Groove 20 Handbag Black
An irresistibly cute bag with a simple shape that is retro yet premium. Crafted from classic blue Oblique canvas, it is exquisite yet full of fashion sense. Suitable for both hand-carry and crossbody, it is lightweight and convenient to carry, and the capacity is sufficient for daily use.
size:20.5*13.5*12cm

items.name_en: Factory Grade Small Dior Jolie Bucket Bag「Black」
items.name_cn:
Factory Grade Small Dior Jolie Bucket Bag「Black」
This Dior Jolie bucket bag is a new arrival from the Fall/Winter 2024 collection, showcasing a stylish look. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a drawstring closure, with a spacious interior. The small size is modern and chic, designed with a removable black leather top handle and an adjustable, removable chain shoulder strap made of vintage gold-finish metal CD links with resin bead embellishments. It can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or slung diagonally.
Drawstring closure
Interior slip pocket
Removable leather top handle
Vintage gold-finish metal CD chain with resin beads and adjustable leather strap
Size: 17 x 16 x 9 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Factory leather with cashmere lining Lady Dior 3-Compartment Pearl Pink, the classic Diana bag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Exquisitely crafted with a visible quilting effect on the trellis pattern, the elegant and classic design is timeless. Adorned with a metallic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Mini style with a detachable chain shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, an ideal companion for evening wear. Detachable chain shoulder strap, can be paired with other embroidered straps as desired. Size: 17×15×7cm

Factory-grade Small Dior Jolie Bucket Bag "White"
This Dior Jolie Bucket Bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Fall/Winter Collection, showcasing a fashionable look. Crafted from black calfskin, it features a large Monogram quilting and a drawstring closure with a spacious interior. The small size is stylish and modern, designed with a detachable black leather top handle, and a detachable adjustable chain shoulder strap made of vintage gold-finish metal CD links accented with resin beads, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.

Detachable leather top handle
Vintage gold-finish metal CD link chain with resin beads and adjustable leather strap

items.name_en: Factory-level Dior Groove🔆 16 Mini Handbag "Blue"
items.name_cn:
Factory-level Dior Groove🔆 16 Mini Handbag "Blue"
This Dior Groove 16 mini handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from blue calfskin, featuring a quilted oversized trellis pattern to elevate the style. Spacious compartment to hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Zipper closure
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Size: 16 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys, and lipstick

items.name_en: Genuine Grade
items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
 Diorstar❤Hobo Chain Bag "Black"
This Diorstar Hobo chain bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, featuring a stylish and practical design. It has a soft silhouette, crafted from black textured calfskin with an oversized houndstooth pattern and a spacious compartment. It features a zip closure with a circular charm engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo and the classic Dior star motif, and exquisite CD rivets on the sides for added style. The interior is lined with suede leather and includes card slots. It comes with an adjustable CD chain shoulder strap with a leather strap for enhanced comfort when carrying.
Zip closure with a circular charm engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo and star
1 compartment
1 slip pocket
4 card slots
Leather and gold-finish metal chain adjustable shoulder strap
Model: 3202
Dimensions: 28.5×14.5×10cm (L×H×W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 2 card holders, and sunglasses

items.name_en: Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version
items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version
Tote Latest Qixi Limited Series, sweet Qixi, exclusive romantic styling, too attractive for girls. The white body is embellished with handwritten French letters and small red hearts, super gentle and sweet, helping you freeze the moment of love. Exquisite embroidery paired with creamy white cowhide, sweet yet elegant. The bag comes with an adjustable long shoulder strap, retaining the simplicity of the bag shape while offering the large capacity of a tote. It can be carried by hand or worn diagonally, fully meeting daily travel needs.
size:26*12*21cm

Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. It accommodates various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Size: 42×35×18.5cm
